acceptance_criteria: Deterministic mode returns route with script_path and timeout
Generative mode creates LLMHandoffTemplate with required fields
Legacy mode routes commands not in manifest or with unknown modes
Manifest allowlist enforcement prevents unmapped commands
quality_guards: Deterministic routes preserve driver_managed flag and exit code semantics
Generative handoff_id is deterministic from run context
Legacy fallback prevents undefined behavior for unmapped commands
